title: neobuxbaumia polylopha
intro: Neobuxbaumia polylopha, also known as the Cardón cactus, is a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Neobuxbaumia polylopha include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
